title: bossiaea oligosperma
intro: Bossiaea oligosperma, also known as the 'hairy bossiaea', is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, Bossiaea oligosperma is often used in teas, tinctures, and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
